title: Animal Genetics: Traits & More
description:
Think you have what it takes to find all the traits?

Animal Genetics: Traits & More, is a light weight collection of mods, it has genetic animals - a mod that gives farm animals real genetics, chisel reborn, along with many other building mods.
body: Are you tired of finding almost no modpacks with genetic animals? well that's where this modpack comes in, it has the building mods Chisel reborn and Rechiseled! storage mods like iron chests, and we can't forget the genetic mods! Genetic animals and animal genetics are the most important parts of this pack; everything is subject to change as we work on this and other packs!
